name: Bona Fide Possession Residency Status

eligibility.description: Requires physical presence in the possession for at least 183 days, no tax home outside the possession, and no closer connection to the U.S. or a foreign country.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Establishes the criteria to be treated as a bona fide resident of a U.S. possession (Guam, American Samoa, CNMI, Puerto Rico, or USVI) to access territory-specific tax exclusions and credits.
